name: Cinder Creatures
description: Cinder monster-catcher pack for GB Studio 4.x v0.36: intro plates from v0.35 are now WIRED into the gym scenes — first walk-in shows the plate (one-shot, gated on var_cc_intro_<type>_seen), press A advances into the actual gym scene, plate skipped on subsequent visits. Five new intro card scenes (cinder_intro_logic/mem/proc/data/core), 5 new flag variables (var_cc_intro_<type>_seen), 5 plate backgrounds copied from plugin into project assets/backgrounds with .gbsres metadata. Each existing gym scene's on-init script gets a guard prepended: IF intro_seen == 0 -> SWITCH_SCENE to intro card. The intro card sets the flag and SWITCH_SCENEs back to the gym, so on second entry the false branch (empty) is taken and play proceeds normally. Closes the next-step on the v0.35 design doc. v0.35: per-gym INTRO PLATES — five 160x144 title-cards (cc_intro_logic/mem/proc/data/core.png) the player sees on first walk-in to each gym. GYM-<TYPE> wordmark up top, ember bar, framed 32x32 type rune (4x scale of the bestiary rune), TITLE + NAME (ARCHIVIST EOS / WARDEN SOMA / CONDUCTOR TEMPO / COURIER HERMES / FOREMAN ATLAS), one-line combat-motif tag in shadow shade, BOOTSEQUENCE band footer. Static plates — every player sees the same intro regardless of save state. Continues the cc_font_8 brand chain (title -> badge case -> gym intros). v0.34: beat_void unlock wired (MEMORY VESSEL system band, vault migration spec, sidecar shim, KNOWN_FLAG_KEYS in decoder). v0.33: full_dex unlock wired (PROFESSOR CINDER persona, four-step shape, sidecar shim). v0.32: BADGE CASE screen (cc_badge_case.png + cc_badge_case_full.png + cc_badge_case_2of5.png) — 5 gym slots in a 3-2 grid with locked dashed boxes / unlocked type-rune fills, agent-name labels (EOS/SOMA/TEMPO/HERMES/ATLAS), 0/5 counter, BOOTSEQUENCE band footer. Reads CC_BADGES env var (5-bit bitfield) so the same script renders any save state. v0.31: cc_font_8.png glyph atlas (64 chars at 8x8, DMG-quantized) shipped under sprites/ for shared brand typography across screens. Title screen now layers a BOOTSEQUENCE version band (swappable per USB build via CC_VERSION_BAND env var) above the MERIDIAN 2026 / PRESS START footer — replaces RBY's RED VERSION / BLUE VERSION line. Carries forward v0.30 all_badges -> VESSEL chat persona + v0.29 ten_caught vault widget + v0.28 first_badge unlock spec + v0.27 save sidecar emitter + v0.25 cinderized creature set (DATA dots / LOGIC bracket / MEM 2x2 block / PROC arrow tail / CORE diagonal) + v0.24 ember-trade gym leaders (PYRE/KILN/HUSKE/WICK/HEARTH) + v0.21 branded title + player-name entry (EVENT_TEXT_INPUT into VAR_PLAYER_NAME, 7-char Pokemon-RBY length) + v0.20 Achievements page + v0.19 Codex tab + v0.18 VOID final fight + v0.17 CORE / v0.16 DATA / v0.15 PROC / v0.14 MEM / v0.12 LOGIC gyms + v0.13 catch loop + v0.11 USB-driven encounter pool + 5-type chart. Adventure Plus + Advanced Dialogue 2 + Advanced Menu 2 plugins also installed in this build.
author: Meridian (for Joel Kometz)
